title: Network Vulnerability Scanner
description: Automated network reconnaissance and vulnerability assessment tool built with Python. Features include port scanning, service enumeration, and CVE mapping.

title: Web Application Fuzzer
description: Custom fuzzing tool for discovering hidden endpoints, parameters, and potential injection points in web applications.

title: CTF Writeups Repository
description: Comprehensive writeups for various Capture The Flag challenges from platforms like HackTheBox, TryHackMe, and PicoCTF.

title: Phishing Detection System
description: Machine learning-based system for detecting phishing URLs and emails using NLP and URL feature analysis.

title: Red Team Toolkit
description: Collection of custom scripts and tools for Red Team engagements including enumeration, privilege escalation, and persistence.

title: Security Dashboard
description: Real-time security monitoring dashboard for visualizing network traffic, alerts, and system health metrics.
